docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KATZ, CHARLES JOSHUA SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SANDERS, DOLORES J.

DISCOVERY 610, THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION -- CHARLES J. KATZ APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT DOLORES J. SANDERS. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED ON PLEADING. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS GRANTED. THE FUNDS ARE EXEMPT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 704.110(B). ANY FUNDS WITHHELD ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
